name: Olive Garden Shrimp Primavera
recipeIngredient: 1 package Knorr Romaglio Pasta (1 ounce) Sauce Mix
1 pound medium shrimp, cooked, peeled and deveined
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in a 3-quart pan over medium heat.
2. Add the remaining sauce ingredients.
3. Stir well and simmer for 10 minutes.
4. In a large sauté pan, melt 2 tablespoons butter.
5. Sauté veggies about 3 minutes until crisp-tender.
6. Add to the sauce and simmer for an additional 5 minutes.
7. When pasta is almost done, stir shrimp into the sauce to heat through.
8. Do not boil.
9. Spoon Shrimp Primavera sauce over hot linguini.
10. Sprinkle with Parmesan.
